name: remote-notifier
description: Receive notifications from remote scripts and tools and present them to the user as system or in-app notifications
author: Damian Dyńdo

commands.title: Remote Notifier: Test VS Code notifications
Remote Notifier: Reset auto-install router extension ignored workspaces

remoteNotifier.systemNotifications.description: When to show OS-level system notifications. 'auto' shows them only when VS Code is unfocused, 'always' always uses OS notifications, 'never' uses only VS Code toasts.

remoteNotifier.notificationIcon.description: Icon style for system notifications. 'transparent' has no background, 'dark' has a black background.

remoteNotifier.notificationSound.description: Play a sound when showing system-level notifications.

remoteNotifier.notificationSoundPath.description: Path to a custom sound file for system notifications. On macOS, also accepts a named system sound (e.g. 'Ping'); leave empty to use the default alert sound. On Linux, played via pw-play; leave empty to play no sound.

remoteNotifier.iconMappings.description: Map icon key names to file paths for system notifications. Example: { "claude": "/path/to/icon.png" }
